sentences.arabic: قَبْلَ السَّفَرِ بِيَوْمٍ كُنْتُ أُجَهِّزُ حَقِيبَتِي بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Dan prije putovanja pažljivo sam slagao kofer.
sentences.translationEn: The day before travelling I was carefully packing my suitcase.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعْتُ الْمَلَابِسَ الْمُنَاسِبَةِ لِكُلِّ يَوْمٍ وَنَسِيتُ شَيْئًا ثُمَّ تَذَكَّرْتُهُ.
sentences.translation: Stavljao sam odgovarajuću odjeću za svaki dan, zaboravljao nešto pa se sjećao.
sentences.translationEn: I laid out the right clothes for each day, forgetting things and then remembering them.

sentences.arabic: تَحَقَّقْتُ مِنَ الأَوْرَاقِ الثُّبُوتِيَّةِ وَجَوَازِ السَّفَرِ مَرَّتَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Provjerio sam isprave i pasoš dva puta.
sentences.translationEn: I checked my documents and passport twice.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعْتُ قَائِمَةً لِلأَشْيَاءِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ حَتَّى لَا أَنْسَى شَيْئًا.
sentences.translation: Napravio sam listu neophodnih stvari da ništa ne zaboravim.
sentences.translationEn: I made a list of essentials so I would not forget anything.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ كَانَتِ الْحَقِيبَةُ جَاهِزَةً وَكُنْتُ مُرْتَاحَ الْبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju je kofer bio spreman i bio sam spokojan.
sentences.translationEn: In the end the suitcase was ready and I was at ease.
